evals.name: envelope-gaps
evals.prompt: Which namespaces in our fleet are missing a default-deny NetworkPolicy or pod-security labels?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-namespace preflight` then `cub-namespace envelope` (JSON or -o table, optionally --incomplete-only) and reports the namespaces whose DEFAULT-DENY / POD-SECURITY members are missing. Does not mutate, does not fall back to kubectl.

evals.name: fleet-inventory
evals.prompt: Give me a per-cluster count of namespaces and workloads.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-namespace snapshot` (optionally -o table or jq on the JSON) and reports per-cluster namespaces / workloads counts plus totals.

evals.name: list-namespaces-one-cluster
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-namespace list --kind Namespace --cluster prod-cluster`, using the filters rather than post-filtering. Read-only.

evals.name: routes-consistency-elsewhere
evals.prompt: Is the apptique namespace the same across dev and prod?
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a cross-variant consistency question, not inventory, and routes to namespace-consistency / `cub-namespace consistency` rather than answering with snapshot/envelope.
